# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

version: "3.9"

services:
  elasticsearch:
    image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.13.4
    container_name: elasticsearch
    environment:
      - node.name=es01
      - cluster.name=ops-backup-cluster
      - discovery.type=single-node
      - xpack.security.enabled=true
      - ELASTIC_PASSWORD=${ELASTIC_PASSWORD:-changeme}
      - path.repo=/usr/share/elasticsearch/backups
      - ES_JAVA_OPTS=-Xms1g -Xmx1g
      - repositories.s3.bucket=${S3_BUCKET:-}
      - repositories.s3.base_path=${S3_BASE_PATH:-snapshots}
      - repositories.s3.client.default.endpoint=${S3_ENDPOINT:-}
      - repositories.s3.client.default.protocol=${S3_PROTOCOL:-https}
      - repositories.s3.client.default.path_style_access=${S3_PATH_STYLE_ACCESS:-true}
      - repositories.s3.client.default.read_timeout=${S3_READ_TIMEOUT:-50s}
      - repositories.s3.client.default.max_retries=${S3_MAX_RETRIES:-3}
      - repositories.s3.client.default.use_throttle_retries=${S3_THROTTLE_RETRIES:-true}
      - repositories.s3.client.default.region=${AWS_REGION:-us-east-1}
      - xpack.security.http.ssl.enabled=false
      - xpack.security.transport.ssl.enabled=false
    volumes:
      - esdata:/usr/share/elasticsearch/data
      - ./backups:/usr/share/elasticsearch/backups
      - ./scripts:/scripts
    ports:
      - "9200:9200"
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "curl -s -u elastic:${ELASTIC_PASSWORD:-changeme} http://localhost:9200/_cluster/health | grep -q '\"status\"'"]
      interval: 20s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 10

  snapshot-setup:
    image: curlimages/curl:8.7.1
    container_name: snapshot-setup
    depends_on:
      elasticsearch:
        condition: service_healthy
    environment:
      - ELASTIC_PASSWORD=${ELASTIC_PASSWORD:-changeme}
      - SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_TYPE=${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_TYPE:-fs}
      - SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_NAME=${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_NAME:-ops-snapshots}
      - SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_LOCATION=${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_LOCATION:-/usr/share/elasticsearch/backups}
      - SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_BUCKET=${S3_BUCKET:-ops-es-backups}
      - SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_BASE_PATH=${S3_BASE_PATH:-snapshots}
      - SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_COMPRESS=${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_COMPRESS:-true}
      - SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_CHUNK_SIZE=${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_CHUNK_SIZE:-64mb}
      - SNAPSHOT_NAME=${SNAPSHOT_NAME:-manual-snapshot}
      - RESTORE_SNAPSHOT_NAME=${RESTORE_SNAPSHOT_NAME:-manual-snapshot}
      - RESTORE_INDICES=${RESTORE_INDICES:-*}
      - RESTORE_RENAME_PATTERN=${RESTORE_RENAME_PATTERN:-}
      - RESTORE_RENAME_REPLACEMENT=${RESTORE_RENAME_REPLACEMENT:-}
      - ACTION=${ACTION:-register}
    volumes:
      - ./scripts:/scripts
    entrypoint: ["/bin/sh", "/scripts/snapshot.sh"]

volumes:
  esdata: {}

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: elasticsearch-s3-keystore
type: Opaque
stringData:
  s3.client.default.access_key: ${AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID}
  s3.client.default.secret_key: ${AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY}
  s3.client.default.session_token: ${AWS_SESSION_TOKEN}

---
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: elasticsearch-snapshot-ops
spec:
  template:
    spec:
      restartPolicy: Never
      containers:
        - name: snapshot-ops
          image: curlimages/curl:8.7.1
          env:
            - name: ELASTICSEARCH_URL
              value: http://elasticsearch:9200
            - name: ELASTIC_USER
              value: elastic
            - name: ELASTIC_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: elastic-credentials
                  key: password
            - name: SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_TYPE
              value: s3
            - name: SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_NAME
              value: ops-snapshots
            - name: SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_BUCKET
              value: ops-es-backups
            - name: SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_BASE_PATH
              value: snapshots
            - name: SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_COMPRESS
              value: "true"
            - name: SNAPSHOT_NAME
              value: nightly-snapshot
            - name: RESTORE_SNAPSHOT_NAME
              value: nightly-snapshot
            - name: RESTORE_INDICES
              value: "*"
            - name: ACTION
              value: register
          command:
            - /bin/sh
            - -c
            - |
              set -e
              AUTH="-u ${ELASTIC_USER}:${ELASTIC_PASSWORD}"
              URL="${ELASTICSEARCH_URL}"
              if [ "${ACTION}" = "register" ]; then
                curl -sS ${AUTH} -X PUT "${URL}/_snapshot/${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_NAME}" \
                  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
                  -d "{
                    \"type\": \"${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_TYPE}\",
                    \"settings\": {
                      \"bucket\": \"${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_BUCKET}\",
                      \"base_path\": \"${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_BASE_PATH}\",
                      \"compress\": ${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_COMPRESS}
                    }
                  }"
              elif [ "${ACTION}" = "create" ]; then
                curl -sS ${AUTH} -X PUT "${URL}/_snapshot/${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_NAME}/${SNAPSHOT_NAME}?wait_for_completion=true" \
                  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
                  -d '{
                    "indices": "*",
                    "ignore_unavailable": true,
                    "include_global_state": true
                  }'
              elif [ "${ACTION}" = "restore" ]; then
                curl -sS ${AUTH} -X POST "${URL}/_snapshot/${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_NAME}/${RESTORE_SNAPSHOT_NAME}/_restore?wait_for_completion=true" \
                  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
                  -d "{
                    \"indices\": \"${RESTORE_INDICES}\",
                    \"ignore_unavailable\": true,
                    \"include_global_state\": false
                  }"
              fi

---
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: CronJob
metadata:
  name: elasticsearch-snapshot-nightly
spec:
  schedule: "0 2 * * *"
  successfulJobsHistoryLimit: 3
  failedJobsHistoryLimit: 3
  jobTemplate:
    spec:
      template:
        spec:
          restartPolicy: Never
          containers:
            - name: snapshot-create
              image: curlimages/curl:8.7.1
              env:
                - name: ELASTICSEARCH_URL
                  value: http://elasticsearch:9200
                - name: ELASTIC_USER
                  value: elastic
                - name: ELASTIC_PASSWORD
                  valueFrom:
                    secretKeyRef:
                      name: elastic-credentials
                      key: password
                - name: SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_NAME
                  value: ops-snapshots
                - name: SNAPSHOT_NAME
                  valueFrom:
                    fieldRef:
                      fieldPath: metadata.name
              command:
                - /bin/sh
                - -c
                - |
                  set -e
                  SNAP="snapshot-$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S)"
                  curl -sS -u ${ELASTIC_USER}:${ELASTIC_PASSWORD} -X PUT "${ELASTICSEARCH_URL}/_snapshot/${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_NAME}/${SNAP}?wait_for_completion=true" \
                    -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
                    -d '{
                      "indices": "*",
                      "ignore_unavailable": true,
                      "include_global_state": true
                    }'

---
snapshot_script: |
  #!/bin/sh
  set -e

  ELASTICSEARCH_URL="${ELASTICSEARCH_URL:-http://elasticsearch:9200}"
  ELASTIC_USER="${ELASTIC_USER:-elastic}"
  ELASTIC_PASSWORD="${ELASTIC_PASSWORD:-changeme}"
  SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_TYPE="${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_TYPE:-fs}"
  SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_NAME="${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_NAME:-ops-snapshots}"
  SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_LOCATION="${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_LOCATION:-/usr/share/elasticsearch/backups}"
  SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_BUCKET="${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_BUCKET:-ops-es-backups}"
  SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_BASE_PATH="${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_BASE_PATH:-snapshots}"
  SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_COMPRESS="${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_COMPRESS:-true}"
  SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_CHUNK_SIZE="${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_CHUNK_SIZE:-64mb}"
  SNAPSHOT_NAME="${SNAPSHOT_NAME:-manual-snapshot}"
  RESTORE_SNAPSHOT_NAME="${RESTORE_SNAPSHOT_NAME:-manual-snapshot}"
  RESTORE_INDICES="${RESTORE_INDICES:-*}"
  RESTORE_RENAME_PATTERN="${RESTORE_RENAME_PATTERN:-}"
  RESTORE_RENAME_REPLACEMENT="${RESTORE_RENAME_REPLACEMENT:-}"
  ACTION="${ACTION:-register}"

  AUTH="-u ${ELASTIC_USER}:${ELASTIC_PASSWORD}"

  register_fs_repo() {
    curl -sS ${AUTH} -X PUT "${ELASTICSEARCH_URL}/_snapshot/${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_NAME}" \
      -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
      -d "{
        \"type\": \"fs\",
        \"settings\": {
          \"location\": \"${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_LOCATION}\",
          \"compress\": ${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_COMPRESS},
          \"chunk_size\": \"${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_CHUNK_SIZE}\"
        }
      }"
  }

  register_s3_repo() {
    curl -sS ${AUTH} -X PUT "${ELASTICSEARCH_URL}/_snapshot/${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_NAME}" \
      -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
      -d "{
        \"type\": \"s3\",
        \"settings\": {
          \"bucket\": \"${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_BUCKET}\",
          \"base_path\": \"${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_BASE_PATH}\",
          \"compress\": ${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_COMPRESS},
          \"chunk_size\": \"${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_CHUNK_SIZE}\"
        }
      }"
  }

  create_snapshot() {
    curl -sS ${AUTH} -X PUT "${ELASTICSEARCH_URL}/_snapshot/${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_NAME}/${SNAPSHOT_NAME}?wait_for_completion=true" \
      -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
      -d '{
        "indices": "*",
        "ignore_unavailable": true,
        "include_global_state": true
      }'
  }

  restore_snapshot() {
    if [ -n "${RESTORE_RENAME_PATTERN}" ] && [ -n "${RESTORE_RENAME_REPLACEMENT}" ]; then
      curl -sS ${AUTH} -X POST "${ELASTICSEARCH_URL}/_snapshot/${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_NAME}/${RESTORE_SNAPSHOT_NAME}/_restore?wait_for_completion=true" \
        -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
        -d "{
          \"indices\": \"${RESTORE_INDICES}\",
          \"ignore_unavailable\": true,
          \"include_global_state\": false,
          \"rename_pattern\": \"${RESTORE_RENAME_PATTERN}\",
          \"rename_replacement\": \"${RESTORE_RENAME_REPLACEMENT}\"
        }"
    else
      curl -sS ${AUTH} -X POST "${ELASTICSEARCH_URL}/_snapshot/${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_NAME}/${RESTORE_SNAPSHOT_NAME}/_restore?wait_for_completion=true" \
        -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
        -d "{
          \"indices\": \"${RESTORE_INDICES}\",
          \"ignore_unavailable\": true,
          \"include_global_state\": false
        }"
    fi
  }

  list_snapshots() {
    curl -sS ${AUTH} -X GET "${ELASTICSEARCH_URL}/_snapshot/${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_NAME}/_all"
  }

  verify_repo() {
    curl -sS ${AUTH} -X POST "${ELASTICSEARCH_URL}/_snapshot/${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_NAME}/_verify"
  }

  case "${ACTION}" in
    register)
      if [ "${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY_TYPE}" = "s3" ]; then
        register_s3_repo
      else
        register_fs_repo
      fi
      ;;
    create)
      create_snapshot
      ;;
    restore)
      restore_snapshot
      ;;
    list)
      list_snapshots
      ;;
    verify)
      verify_repo
      ;;
    *)
      echo "Unsupported ACTION=${ACTION}"
      exit 1
      ;;
  esac
